Memory management, helper functions, initialization, property lookup, and literal storage for ECMA in JerryScript.


## Files
- **[ecma-alloc.c](ecma-alloc.c.md)**: Memory allocation and deallocation routines for ECMA data types in the JerryScript engine.
- **[ecma-alloc.h](ecma-alloc.h.md)**: Memory allocation and deallocation routines for various ECMA data types.
- **[ecma-gc.c](ecma-gc.c.md)**: Implementation of a garbage collector for managing memory in the JerryScript engine.
- **[ecma-gc.h](ecma-gc.h.md)**: Header file for ECMA garbage collection functions and memory management in JerryScript.
- **[ecma-globals.h](ecma-globals.h.md)**: Header file defining data structures, types, and macros for ECMA values, properties, and objects in JerryScript.
- **[ecma-helpers-conversion.c](ecma-helpers-conversion.c.md)**: Helper functions and macros for converting between ECMA data types, including 128-bit integer operations and string-to-number conversions.
- **[ecma-helpers-errol.c](ecma-helpers-errol.c.md)**: Functions for high-precision floating-point operations and Errol0 double to ASCII conversion.
- **[ecma-helpers-external-pointers.c](ecma-helpers-external-pointers.c.md)**: Functions for creating, retrieving, and freeing external pointer properties in ECMA objects.
- **[ecma-helpers-number.c](ecma-helpers-number.c.md)**: Helper functions for operations on ECMA numbers, including packing, unpacking, arithmetic, and special value handling.
- **[ecma-helpers-string.c](ecma-helpers-string.c.md)**: Functions for creating, manipulating, and comparing ECMA strings, including operations for UTF-8 and CESU-8 encoding.
- **[ecma-helpers-value.c](ecma-helpers-value.c.md)**: Helper functions for operations with ECMA data types, including value creation, conversion, and management.
- **[ecma-helpers-values-collection.c](ecma-helpers-values-collection.c.md)**: Functions for managing collections of ECMA values, including allocation, deallocation, and iteration.
- **[ecma-helpers.c](ecma-helpers.c.md)**: Helper functions for operations with ECMA data types, including object and property management.
- **[ecma-helpers.h](ecma-helpers.h.md)**: Helper macros and functions for operations with ECMA data types, including string and number conversions.
- **[ecma-init-finalize.c](ecma-init-finalize.c.md)**: Initialization and finalization functions for ECMA components in the JerryScript engine.
- **[ecma-init-finalize.h](ecma-init-finalize.h.md)**: Initialization and finalization functions for ECMA components.
- **[ecma-lcache.c](ecma-lcache.c.md)**: Implements a property lookup cache for efficient object property access in the JerryScript engine.
- **[ecma-lcache.h](ecma-lcache.h.md)**: Header file for the ECMA property lookup cache with functions to initialize, insert, lookup, and invalidate.
- **[ecma-literal-storage.c](ecma-literal-storage.c.md)**: Manages ECMA literal storage, including functions for creating, finding, and saving literals.
- **[ecma-literal-storage.h](ecma-literal-storage.h.md)**: Header file for managing ECMA literal storage, including functions for creating and handling literals.
- **[ecma-property-hashmap.c](ecma-property-hashmap.c.md)**: Implements a property hashmap for managing named properties in ECMAScript objects, including creation, insertion, deletion, and lookup functions.
- **[ecma-property-hashmap.h](ecma-property-hashmap.h.md)**: Defines the structure and functions for managing a property hashmap in the ECMA engine.
